The uranium was in the form of solid compound of U02.
The foil was prepared with the vacuum evaporation
technique in which uranium dioxide was evaporated
onto a 5 mil nickel backing. The circular target foil
was 2 cm in radius, or about 12.5 cm2 in area. The
total amount of uranium was 5.325 mg. The thickness
of the UO2 foil was 484 +- 25 micro-g/cm2.
